title: 직접화법(Direct Quotations)으로 AL 받기
summary: 직접화법(Direct Quotations) 3가지 패턴: ① 다른 사람 말 인용 'she was like...' ② 내 생각 인용 'I thought to myself...' ③ 내 반응 인용 'I was like...' — 이것만 써도 답변이 훨씬 생동감 있어진다
오픽 콤보셋 3종류: Description(묘사), Past Experience(과거 경험), Habit & Comparison(습관/비교) — 각 유형마다 구조가 다름
Past Experience 답변 구조: 메인 포인트 → 감정/세부사항 → 결론 (3단계)
Detail-oriented(세부사항 위주)가 아닌 Feelings-oriented(감정 위주)로 답변하라 — AL의 핵심
'give someone the lowdown on ~' — ~에 대해 자세히 알려주다. 구어체에서 매우 자연스러운 표현
직접화법을 쓰면 채점자 입장에서 답변이 더 드라마틱하고 dynamic하게 들린다 — AL 점수 차별화 포인트

keyExpressions.en: she was like, 'Sam, make sure to separate everything'
keyExpressions.ko: 엄마가 '샘, 꼭 다 분리해야 해' 라고 했다
keyExpressions.note: 다른 사람 말을 인용하는 직접화법 패턴 — 'was like' + 따옴표

keyExpressions.en: I thought to myself, 'holy cow, this is amazing'
keyExpressions.ko: 속으로 '와, 이거 진짜 대박이다' 라고 생각했다
keyExpressions.note: 내 생각을 인용하는 직접화법 — 'I thought to myself' + 따옴표

keyExpressions.en: I was like, 'I can't believe how good this is'
keyExpressions.ko: 나는 '이게 이렇게 좋을 수가 있어?' 라고 했다
keyExpressions.note: 내 반응을 인용하는 직접화법 — 'I was like' + 따옴표

keyExpressions.en: my mother gave me the lowdown on how to recycle
keyExpressions.note: give someone the lowdown on ~ = ~에 대해 자세히 설명해주다

keyExpressions.en: not before long, it became my full responsibility
keyExpressions.ko: 얼마 지나지 않아 그게 온전히 내 책임이 됐다
keyExpressions.note: not before long = 얼마 안 가서, 금세

keyExpressions.en: it was a little bit annoying at times, but I had no choice
keyExpressions.ko: 가끔 좀 짜증났지만 선택의 여지가 없었다
keyExpressions.note: 감정 표현 + 상황 설명을 자연스럽게 이어주는 패턴

keyExpressions.en: I learned to separate the cans, paper, glass and plastics and put them in their proper bins
keyExpressions.ko: 캔, 종이, 유리, 플라스틱을 분리해서 각 통에 넣는 법을 배웠다

keyExpressions.en: I decided to try out a new coffee shop nearby my home that just opened up
keyExpressions.ko: 집 근처에 막 생긴 새 카페를 한번 가보기로 했다
keyExpressions.note: try out = 시도해보다, just opened up = 막 오픈했다
holy cow = 감탄사 (wow보다 더 생동감 있는 표현)

keyExpressions.en: I couldn't believe how wonderful it tasted
keyExpressions.ko: 맛이 얼마나 훌륭한지 믿을 수가 없었다
keyExpressions.note: I couldn't believe how + 형용사 — 강한 감탄 표현 패턴

cards.example: She was like, 'Sam, make sure to separate everything.'
I thought to myself, 'holy cow, this is amazing.'
I was like, 'I can't believe how good this is.'
My mother gave me the lowdown on how to recycle when I was young.
Not before long, it became my full responsibility.

cards.back: It was a little bit annoying at times, but I had no choice.
cards.example: It was a little bit annoying at times, but I had no choice, so I just did it.

cards.front: 집 근처에 막 생긴 카페를 가보기로 했다
cards.back: I decided to try out a new coffee shop nearby my home that just opened up.
cards.example: I decided to try out a new coffee shop nearby my home that just opened up.
When I got there, I thought to myself, 'holy cow, this is amazing.'

cards.front: 맛이 얼마나 훌륭한지 믿을 수가 없었다 (강한 감탄 패턴)
cards.back: I couldn't believe how wonderful it tasted.
cards.example: I couldn't believe how wonderful it tasted. It was truly amazing.
